titleStmt.title: SII 17.177: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 177. (A.R. No. 157 of 1904.) TIRUPPĀLAPPANDAL, CUDDALORE TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the south wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Madhyasthanāthēśvara temple.
This incomplete inscription which is in Tamil verse is in praise of Magadēśaṉ the well-known Bāṇa chief. His natal star is stated to be Uttirāḍam.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tāru muṭiyu muracun tamakkuriya pāru muṭaṉpeṟuvar pārventar virap perumā
ḷ makatecaṉ pereḻutit tattan tirumārpil Āḷolai ceytu + vaṉ maturai viṭṭe
kaṭalāṉa māl vaḻuti teṉ maturai viṭṭiṉṟu teṉ kaṭalāṉ naṉnutalāy mal
lār toḷ mākatar komāṉ muṉintāl maṉṉavaruk kellāṅ kaṭalo viṭam .
Āḻantarukaṭal vaiyyttaracu celuttiya ceṅkolaracellām veḻanta
rukoṭai vāṇativākaraṉ viti muṟai ceyvatu mey kaṇṭīr Īḻantiṟaiyiṭum
kkeppaṭi yiṭumiṉ teṉṉa riṭīrākiṟ coḻaṉ tiṟaiyiṭu miyāṉaik kuṅkaḷai Iṭume
ṉṟiru mitu coṉṉome .—pāroṅku koṟṟak kuṭaivāṇaṉ palapuravit teroṉ
tiru vuttirāṭanāḷ peruvamai kuṉṟeṭāmāli yāṉaik ko ventar viṟṟiruppa niThe last foot of this veṇbā is lost.
Digital edition of SII 17.177 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
